events.name: Web Summit
events.description: The largest technology conference in the world returns to Lisbon to discuss the future of AI, innovation, and the global impact of technology on modern society.

events.name: Super Bock Super Rock
events.description: Experience authentic rock by the Meco beach. Three days of intense music, camping, and an unforgettable atmosphere at one of Portugal's most iconic festivals.

events.name: NOS Alive
events.description: Where the dream happens. The Passeio Marítimo de Algés hosts the best indie, rock, and pop lineup, combining the Lisbon sun with the best music of the moment.

events.name: MEO Marés Vivas
events.description: A festival with a privileged view over the Douro River, bringing major national and international pop-rock names to the north of the country.

events.name: MEO Sudoeste
events.description: The favorite vacation week for young Portuguese. Plenty of sun, beach, and the longest nights of electronic music and urban rhythms in Zambujeira.

events.name: Tech Business Summit
events.description: Focused on leaders and entrepreneurs, this summit explores how new technologies are transforming traditional business models.

events.name: FuturTech Experience
events.description: An immersive experience in Porto about robotics, virtual reality, and the technologies of tomorrow that are already shaping our daily lives.

events.name: Portugal Tech Week
events.description: A week dedicated to the Portuguese startup ecosystem, featuring workshops, networking, and decentralized events throughout the city of Lisbon.

events.name: Grande Arraial Belém
events.description: Celebrate Portuguese tradition in a historical setting. Typical food, handicrafts, and folk music right by the Tagus River.

events.name: Olhão City Festival
events.description: A celebration of Algarve culture. From seafood to traditional music, explore the essence of Olhão in a unique festival for the whole family.

events.name: Festival dos Canais
events.description: Art, contemporary circus, and concerts spread across the canals of Aveiro. The 'Venice of Portugal' transforms into a giant stage for creativity.

events.name: Santos Populares
events.description: June nights in Lisbon are not the same without the smell of grilled sardines and the excitement of traditional neighborhoods like Alfama and Graça.
